| ByteDance Monolith real-time recommendation | https://arxiv.org/pdf/2209.07663 |

## Evidence mapping

| Claim | Source type | Strongest source |
|---|---|---|
| TikTok uses interactions, full watches, skips, sounds, hashtags, user info | Official docs | TikTok Support |
| Shorts exposes viewed-vs-swiped | Official docs | YouTube Help |
| Meta combines many predictions including sharing | Official docs | Meta About |
| YouTube recommender uses candidate generation + ranking | Industry paper | Google Research |
| Expected watch time can be a ranking objective | Industry paper | Google Research |
| Instagram supports originality/new audience changes | Official creator blog | Instagram Creators |
| Short-video labels should normalize engagement | Academic paper | SnapUGC |
| Exploration is needed under uncertainty | Academic theory | MAB-A paper |
| TRIBE predicts fMRI responses to video/audio/text | Official/model card | Hugging Face / Meta |
